synopsis: Collects material from (not listed in reading order) A Decade of Dark Horse (1996) #2, Sergio Aragonés Stomps Star Wars (2000) One-Shot, Star Wars Galaxy Collector (1998) #1-3, Star Wars Galaxy Magazine (1994) #13, Star Wars Visionaries (2005) OGN SC, Star Wars: Jabba the Hutt (1995) #1-4, Star Wars: Podracing Tales (2000) exclusively online, Star Wars: Tag & Bink Are Dead (2001) #1-2, Star Wars: Tag & Bink II (2006) #1-2, Star Wars: The Bounty Hunters (1999) #2 / Scoundrel, Star Wars: The Jabba Tape (1998) #1
title: Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 2
